Package org.eventb.internal.ui.prover

Class HypothesisComposite

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.ui.prover.HypothesisComposite
All Implemented Interfaces:
EventListener, org.eclipse.jface.util.IPropertyChangeListener, org.eclipse.swt.events.SelectionListener, org.eclipse.swt.internal.SWTEventListener, IUserSupportManagerChangedListener
Direct Known Subclasses:
CacheHypothesisComposite, SearchHypothesisComposite, SelectedHypothesisComposite
public abstract class HypothesisComposite extends Object implements IUserSupportManagerChangedListener, org.eclipse.swt.events.SelectionListener, org.eclipse.jface.util.IPropertyChangeListener
See Also:
  • IProofStateDelta.F_NODE
  • IProofStateDelta.F_PROOFTREE
  • IProofStateDelta.F_CACHE
  • IProofStateDelta.F_SEARCH

  • Constructor Details

    • HypothesisComposite

      public HypothesisComposite(IUserSupport userSupport, int flags, ProverUI proverUI, String viewName)
      Constructor.

      Parameters:
      userSupport - the User Support associated with this Hypothesis Page. This value must not be null.
      flags - the IProofStateDelta flags that this page should respond to when changes occur in the proof state. For example, IProofStateDelta.F_NODE | IProofStateDelta.F_SEARCH specify that the page is refresh when the current node or the search hypothesis has been changed,
      proverUI - the main prover editor associated with this Hypothesis Composite. This value must not be null.
      viewName - view name for debugging purposes

  • Method Details

    • dispose

      public void dispose()
      Dispose the hypothesis composite by disposing the hypothesis rows.

    • createControl

      public void createControl(org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Composite parent)
      Create the control of the hypothesis composite. This should be called after the constructor.
      Parameters:
      parent - the composite parent of the hypothesis composite.

    • createTopCoolBar

      private org.eclipse.swt.widgets.CoolBar createTopCoolBar(org.eclipse.swt.widgets.Composite parent)

    • createDummyToolbar

      private static void createDummyToolbar(org.eclipse.swt.widgets.CoolBar buttonBar)

    • setLayoutData

      private static void setLayoutData(org.eclipse.swt.widgets.CoolBar buttonBar)

    • setScrolledLayout

      private static void setScrolledLayout(org.eclipse.swt.custom.ScrolledComposite scComp, org.eclipse.swt.widgets.CoolBar buttonBar)

    • createItems

      public abstract void createItems(org.eclipse.swt.widgets.ToolBar toolBar)
      Abstract method for create different items within the top tool bar.
      Parameters:
      toolBar - the parent tool bar where different items to be created.

    • updateToolbarItems

      public abstract void updateToolbarItems()
      Clients implement this method to Update the status of the different tool bar items.

    • getProverSequent

      private IProverSequent getProverSequent(IProofState ps)
      Utility method for getting the prover sequent associated with a proof state.
      Parameters:
      ps - a proof state.
      Returns:
      the prover sequent at the current node of the proof state. Return null if the proof state itself is null or the current node within the proof state is null.

    • isEnabled

      private boolean isEnabled(IProofState ps)
      Utility method to check if the hypothesis should be enable for a proof state.
      Parameters:
      ps - a proof state
      Returns:
      true if the current node of the proof state is opened. Return false if the proof state is null or the current node of the proof state is null or the current node of the proof state is closed.

    • refresh

      protected void refresh()
      Refresh the content of the hypothesis composite by recreating the hypothesis rows. This must be called within the UI Threads.

    • getHypotheses

      public abstract Iterable<Predicate> getHypotheses(IProofState ps)
      Abstract method to get the list of hypotheses. Clients implement this method to return the appropriate hypotheses which will be displayed, e.g. Searched Hypotheses or Cached Hypotheses.
      Parameters:
      ps - a proof state
      Returns:
      a collection of hypotheses as an Iterable.

    • reinitialise

      private void reinitialise(Iterable<Predicate> hyps, IProverSequent sequent, boolean enabled)
      Utility method for initialising the hypothesis rows with the given collection of hypothesis, the prover sequent. Also specify if the hypothesis rows should be enable or not.
      Parameters:
      hyps - a collection of hypotheses.
      sequent - a prover sequent
      enabled - true if the hypothesis rows should be enabled.

    • totalClearance

      private void totalClearance()

    • initStyledTextAndManager

      private void initStyledTextAndManager()

    • userSupportManagerChanged

      public void userSupportManagerChanged(IUserSupportManagerDelta delta)
      Description copied from interface: IUserSupportManagerChangedListener
      Notifies that one or more user supports have changed. The specific details of the change are described by the given delta.
      Specified by:
      userSupportManagerChanged in interface IUserSupportManagerChangedListener
      Parameters:
      delta - the delta describes the changes.

    • needRefresh

      private boolean needRefresh(IUserSupportDelta affectedUserSupport)

      public void setFocus()
      Pass the focus to the scrolled form.

      Get the top-level control.
      Returns:
      the top-level control

      public IUserSupport getUserSupport()
      Get the user support associated with the hypothesis composite.
      Returns:
      the user support associated with the hypothesis composite.

      public Set<Predicate> getSelectedHyps()
      Get the set of current selected hypotheses.
      Returns:
      the set of selected hypotheses.

    • inverseSelectedHyps

      public void inverseSelectedHyps()
      Inverse the current selection.

    • deselectAllHyps

      public void deselectAllHyps()
      De-select all hypotheses.

    • selectAllHyps

      public void selectAllHyps()
      Select all hypotheses.

    • scrollToBottom

      public void scrollToBottom()
      Scroll to the bottom of the list of hypothesis rows. This is implemented directly by calculating the uppermost line to be shown.

    • setSize

      public void setSize(int width, int height)
      Set the size of the top-level control.
      Parameters:
      width - the desired width for the top-level control.
      height - the desired height for the top-level control.

    • propertyChange

      public void propertyChange(org.eclipse.jface.util.PropertyChangeEvent event)
      Specified by:
      propertyChange in interface org.eclipse.jface.util.IPropertyChangeListener
